content.speakerText: Hi Sarah, thanks for making time today. Ready to walk through Q2 progress?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，莎拉，谢谢您抽出时间，我们开始讲Q2进展吧？
expectedAnswers: Absolutely, I've got all the key metrics ready.
Of course — I'm all set to go over the numbers with you.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应并推进对话，而非拖延或回避
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：是否符合职场口语习惯，语气礼貌自然
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'get started', 'key metrics', 'go over' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Good morning, Mr. Thompson. I appreciate you joining us for this review.
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，汤普森先生，感谢您参加这次评审。
expectedAnswers: Thank you — I'm ready to hear the updates.
I'm glad to be here. Let's dive into the results.
Thanks for having me. I've reviewed the materials and look forward to the discussion.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应感谢并表达参与意愿
语言准确性：正确使用 'glad to be here', 'dive into', 'look forward to' 等表达
表达自然度：是否避免生硬或机械式回应，体现真实对话感
关键词覆盖：是否使用 'appreciate', 'review', 'updates', 'discussion' 等场景关键词
